candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of sales
candidates.why: This is the only operating D&A row explicitly tied to the selected COGS bucket ('Cost of sales'). However, it appears to be a sub-component of the selected total Cost of sales line, not a separate same-level expense to add later. The totals reconcile with other Cost of sales components, indicating it is already embedded.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is 'Cost of sales'. 'Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of sales' appears within that bucket and is already included in the selected parent row, so adding it separately would double count.

candidates.why: Explicit operating D&A tied to the selected XSGA component 'Selling expenses', but it appears to be a sub-component of that selected total rather than a separate add-on line. The selling expense total reconciles with this D&A plus other selling components, indicating inclusion.

Explicit operating D&A tied to the selected XSGA component 'Administrative expenses', but it appears to be a sub-component of that selected total rather than a separate add-on line. The administrative expense total reconciles with this D&A plus other admin components, indicating inclusion.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA reference bucket is the sum of 'Selling expenses', 'Administrative expenses', 'Research and development', and 'Research and Development'. The visible D&A rows are explicitly 'in Selling expenses' and 'in Administrative expenses' and appear embedded in those selected parent rows. No separate same-level SG&A D&A summary row is present. No explicit R&D amortization row is shown, so nothing should be added separately.
